phrases.english: I am very happy today because the weather is beautiful.
phrases.arabic: أنا سعيد جدًا اليوم لأن الطقس جميل.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana sa'eed jiddan al-yawm li'anna al-taqs jameel.
phrases.context: Use this to express your happiness about a pleasant day.

phrases.english: This food tastes delicious, it makes me happy.
phrases.arabic: هذا الطعام لذيذ جدًا، إنه يجعلني سعيدًا.
phrases.pronunciation: Hadha al-ta'am ladheedh jiddan, innahu yaj'aluni sa'eedan.
phrases.context: Say this when you enjoy a meal immensely.

phrases.english: Seeing my family always brings me joy.
phrases.arabic: رؤية عائلتي تجلب لي السعادة دائمًا.
phrases.context: Express this sentiment when you are with loved ones.

phrases.english: I feel a sense of peace and happiness when I read books.
phrases.arabic: أشعر بالسلام والسعادة عندما أقرأ الكتب.
phrases.context: Share this when talking about your hobbies and how they affect you.

phrases.english: Thank you, your kindness has made me truly happy.
phrases.context: Use this to show gratitude for someone's kind actions.
